title: Awesome Enchantments
body:
# Awesome Enchantments

**Part of the Awesome Mods** -- requires https://modrinth.com/mod/awesome-core!

- critical
- ice & poison aspects
- infinity bow requires no arrow
- last stand
- magnetism
- silk touch spawners
- unbreakable (truly unbreaking)
- vampirism
- vein mining (ores and logs)

https://github.com/shkschneider/mc_awesome/blob/main/README.md
